global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with a logo, headline, and call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery service with an emphasis on freshness.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'FreshDash' in bold, modern typography, positioned prominently at the top center.

elements.label: Two empty containers
elements.description: A simple line drawing of two empty containers with a circular element, suggesting food delivery or freshness.

elements.label: Circular element
elements.description: A small circular element is placed near the containers, adding a decorative touch to the design.

elements.label: Hungry? We got you
elements.description: The headline text is bold and white, conveying a sense of urgency and inviting the viewer to engage.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Learn more' in white, set against an orange background, encouraging action.

elements.label: Fresh favorites nearby
elements.description: The body text is in a lighter font, providing additional context about the service offered.
